kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: If Edmund goes with Southgate, then Blacksmith goes with 9 coins.
Exactly two of these are true: Beatrix goes with Blacksmith; Wulfric goes with Carpenter; Potter goes with Southgate.
Rowan, Southgate, and 7 coins belong to different artisans.
Between 3 coins and 9 coins, one goes with Godfrey and the other with Kingsford.
Carpenter goes with exactly two of Wulfric, Highrow, and 7 coins.
Eastcheap goes with at least one of Carpenter, Potter, or 11 coins.
Beatrix's levy is higher than both the Mason and the artisan in Southgate.
Exactly one member of the Clothiers' Guild is in the River Ward.
Exactly one of these is true: Godfrey goes with 9 coins; Wulfric goes with Carpenter; Millpond goes with 11 coins.
Cooper, Southgate, and 13 coins go with Edmund, Rowan, and Wulfric, in some order.
Either 9 coins goes with Beatrix or someone in the Joiners' Guild goes with Godfrey (but not both).
